default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss team morale, client updates, and workload transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team morale is generally positive, with most members rating personal and professional satisfaction around 7-8 out of 10](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Several client transitions and workload shifts are occurring due to team members' upcoming time off](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [New hires and promotions are helping to address capacity issues, but careful management of workloads is still needed](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Some clients (e.g., Interwell, Sentinel One) are presenting challenges or changing directions, requiring adaptability](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Team Morale Check-in

  - [Most team members reported personal satisfaction levels of 7-8 out of 10](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Professional satisfaction levels were slightly lower, averaging 6-7 out of 10](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Common concerns included workload capacity and lack of performance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Positive news: George promoted to Chief of Staff, Aida approved for home loan](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

### Client Transitions and Workload Management

  - [Matt out for 2 weeks, NEM out week after next](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Monograph and Metronome transitioning to Panzer (acting as CM, ME, and Account Director)](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [New technical ME joining Monday to support Panzer](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Ade joining Monday to support Diligent, Okta, and Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Hypergrowth potentially transitioning out of Aida's workload](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

### Client Updates

  - [Engine: Client very satisfied with content quality, outperforming previous agency (Graphite)](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Interwell: Publishing pipeline ready, content production started](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Airbyte: Implementing feedback, SEO testing in progress](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Diligent: Working on site audit and single content view](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Okta: Creating artifacts for AE enablement in retail Auth0 org](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Sentinel One: Pivoting to focus on AI cybersecurity positioning](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Outreach: Artifacts sent, product deep dive scheduled next week](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Capacity and Hiring

  - [Team members encouraged to communicate if feeling overwhelmed](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Andi actively interviewing and trying to bring in more help](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [New hires expected to alleviate some capacity issues](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to send meeting link for further discussion on Airbyte and capacity](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Aida to send emails regarding Sentinel One's new direction, CC'ing George and Sydney](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring workloads and communicate capacity issues](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Andi and George to have a detailed discussion about capacity and workload distribution](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Marisol to manage Augment Code newsletter alongside 20 articles, with George providing support as needed](https://fathom.video/share/vdYTthX7LxdvrDmtETx7QrJqLyAQsVCu?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
